reason: Buyer target is the CFO (no buyer-CEO/board peer lever), so engaging her is textbook VP/SVP/CRO/CMO work, not CEO work; Zycus already has CMO Amit Shah (commercial/pricing) and VP Sales John Woodcock engaged for the 1 Jul CFO meeting, pricing is competitive within the buyer's stated 400-500K range, and the real blocker is presales-to-CIO (AI iSaaS) plus an ROI case — all senior-exec/execution, none requiring the CEO.
